description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named LibreOffice wrapper that runs on pushes to master, main, develop, and actions_javascript branches, as well as tags matching v*, and on pull requests to master, main, and develop branches. Use a single ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository with submodules, installs dependencies including LibreOffice, configures CMake for building with LibreOffice support, builds the project, and archives the resulting LibreOffice artifacts.
